name: pi-tdd
description: TDD enforcement gate for pi coding agent — enforces SPEC/RED/GREEN/REFACTOR cycle with pre-flight and post-flight LLM reviews at cycle boundaries

scripts.test:dist-prompts: npm run build && node -e "import('./dist/prompt-loader.js').then(({ loadPrompt, loadPromptList }) => { const systemPrompt = loadPrompt('preflight-system'); const guidelines = loadPromptList('tool-preflight-guidelines'); if (!systemPrompt.startsWith('You are a TDD pre-flight reviewer.')) throw new Error('dist prompt mismatch'); if (guidelines.length !== 3) throw new Error('dist prompt guideline count mismatch'); console.log('dist prompts ok'); })"
